data.title: About
data.heading: About
data.content:
Elina Voss is a Copenhagen-based photographer specializing in editorial, portrait, and street photography. With over a decade of experience, her work has been featured in Kinfolk, Cereal, and The Gentlewoman.

Her approach is rooted in natural light and quiet observation — finding beauty in the understated moments that define our visual landscape.

Elina studied Visual Communication at the Royal Danish Academy of Fine Arts and has worked with brands including Cos, Hay, and Aesop.

She is currently available for editorial commissions, brand partnerships, and gallery exhibitions.
